entity.summary: Turkey-focused centralized cryptocurrency exchange offering TRY deposits, spot markets, conversion, OTC, and API access.
entity.notes: The first-party site presents active registration, KYC, TRY funding, spot trading, and market services. CoinGecko also reports current markets and trading activity.
